extDesc.message: Batch export Youdao Cloud Notes to Markdown with images and folder structure

loginRequired.message: Please log in to Youdao Notes first

loginHint.message: Open note.youdao.com in your browser and log in

retryLoadHint.message: Return after login and click "Load Notebooks"

permissionHint.message: Enable site access for youdao.com in the extension settings

cookieExpired.message: Login expired, please log in again

welcomeTipMarkdown.message: Exports Markdown and downloads images automatically

welcomeTipZip.message: A ZIP file will be created and downloaded when done

taskCleared.message: Current task and export progress cleared

sponsorModalDesc.message: If this tool helped you, small sponsorships help keep it maintained.

sponsorTip.message: Scan with WeChat. Any amount is appreciated.

sponsorTipShort.message: Scan with WeChat. Any amount is appreciated.

settingsGeneralDesc.message: No extra configuration is required. Keep your browser logged in to export.

authTip.message: Authentication: keep note.youdao.com logged in, and the extension will use browser cookies automatically. No manual token is required.

exportBehaviorDesc1.message: Exports are Markdown files plus same-level assets folders. Images, Draw.io, and Excalidraw resources are stored in assets; mind maps and tables are converted to Markdown.

exportBehaviorDesc2.message: Export tasks run in the background, so closing the popup will not interrupt them. A ZIP file downloads automatically when complete.

settingsAboutDesc.message: A simple one-click batch export tool for Youdao Notes

projectIntroDesc1.message: YoudaoNote Export is a Chrome extension for Youdao Notes users. It batch exports notes to Markdown for migration, backup, or long-term archiving.

projectIntroDesc2.message: All processing happens locally. No user data is collected or uploaded.

featureBatchDesc.message: Export all notebooks while preserving folder structure

featureMarkdownDesc.message: Convert XML/JSON notes to standard Markdown

featureImageDesc.message: Download note images and rewrite links to local paths

featureZipDesc.message: Package export results into one downloadable ZIP

featureProgressDesc.message: View progress and pause or resume exporting

featurePrivacyDesc.message: Local processing only, no uploads, browser-cookie authentication

contactDesc.message: If you run into issues or have suggestions, contact me here:

disclaimer1.message: This is a personal open-source project and is not affiliated with Youdao Notes (note.youdao.com).

disclaimer2.message: Use it only to export and back up notes you are authorized to access.

disclaimer3.message: Exported content remains owned by its original authors. Users must comply with applicable laws.

disclaimer4.message: The author is not responsible for data loss, account risk, or other losses caused by using this tool.

disclaimer5.message: This tool does not collect, store, or upload user data. All operations run in the local browser.

supportDesc.message: If YoudaoNote Export helped you, consider buying me a coffee. Your support helps keep it maintained.

tip1.message: Make sure you are logged in to Youdao Notes before exporting

tip2.message: Closing the popup does not stop background export

tip3.message: Large notebooks may take a while

tip4.message: Image resources are stored in same-level assets folders

tip5.message: Only Markdown files and their assets are exported

privacyDesc.message: All data is processed locally in your browser and is never uploaded. Cookie authentication is automatic.

authRequired.message: Please log in to note.youdao.com and make sure site access is enabled for the extension

cstkMissing.message: YNOTE_CSTK was not found. Please log in to note.youdao.com first

noExportableFiles.message: No exportable files were collected. Select at least one file or folder
